title: althaea officinalis subsp. micrantha
intro: Althaea officinalis subsp. micrantha, also known as marshmallow, is a plant species within the Malvaceae family. This perennial herb is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, demulcent, and soothing effects. The health benefits of Althaea officinalis subsp. micrantha include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin conditions and gastrointestinal issues. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine and natural health practices.
